message:
Fix bugs in update-cli command

- Add error handler to download stream promise (prevents hang on write errors)
- Fix channel type to match config interface ("stable" | "beta")
- Fix bun/node detection to check basename only (prevents false positives
  for paths like /home/bunny/bin/jfp)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
